items.line_en: Hi, my name is Anika.

coach.say: Hi, my name is Anika.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hi, / my name is Anika.

items.line_en: If I could be any king, I would be a doctor.

coach.say: If I could be any king, I would be a doctor.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If I could be any king, / I would be a doctor.

items.line_en: Hi, I'm Anika.

coach.say: Hi, I'm Anika.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hi, / I'm Anika.

items.line_en: If I could be anything, I would be a doctor.

coach.say: If I could be anything, I would be a doctor.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If I could be anything, / I would be a doctor.

items.line_en: I would work in a doctor's office.

coach.say: I would work in a doctor's office.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I would work in a doctor's office.

items.line_en: I would wear a white lap coat and a step of scope around my neck.

coach.say: I would wear a white lap coat and a step of scope around my neck.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I would wear a white lap coat and / a step of scope around my neck.

items.line_en: I would use my step of scope to listen to my patient's heartbeat.

coach.say: I would use my step of scope to listen to my patient's heartbeat.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I would use my step of scope to listen to my patient's heartbeat.

items.line_en: And I would use a reflex hammer to check my patient's reflexes.

coach.say: And I would use a reflex hammer to check my patient's reflexes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And I would use a reflex hammer to check my patient's reflexes.

items.line_en: Watch out!

coach.say: Watch out!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Watch out!

items.line_en: Yep, good reflexes.

coach.say: Yep, good reflexes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yep, / good reflexes.

items.line_en: Even sneezing is a reflex.

coach.say: Even sneezing is a reflex.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Even sneezing is a reflex.

items.line_en: Look out!

coach.say: Look out!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Look out!

items.line_en: When people are sick, they would come visit me.

coach.say: When people are sick, they would come visit me.
coach.hint: Chunk it: When people are sick, / they would come visit me.

items.line_en: I would use my doctor's tools to try and see what's wrong.

coach.say: I would use my doctor's tools to try and see what's wrong.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I would use my doctor's tools to try and / see what's wrong.

items.line_en: I checked her temperature like a thermometer.

coach.say: I checked her temperature like a thermometer.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I checked her temperature like a thermometer.

items.line_en: Uh oh!

coach.say: Uh oh!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Uh oh!

items.line_en: If the thermometer turns red, it means the patient has a fever.

coach.say: If the thermometer turns red, it means the patient has a fever.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If the thermometer turns red, / it means the patient has a fever.

items.line_en: Sometime, I need to look inside the patient's ears and eyes too.

coach.say: Sometime, I need to look inside the patient's ears and eyes too.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Sometime, / I need to look inside the patient's ears and eyes too.

items.line_en: I checked inside her throat and asked a patient to say, ah!

coach.say: I checked inside her throat and asked a patient to say, ah!
coach.hint: Chunk it: I checked inside her throat and asked a patient to say, / ah!

items.line_en: If I see germs inside, the patient's throat.

coach.say: If I see germs inside, the patient's throat.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If I see germs inside, / the patient's throat.

items.line_en: I would say, please go away, yucky germs.

coach.say: I would say, please go away, yucky germs.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I would say, / please go away, / yucky germs.

items.line_en: If the germs don't leave, I'll give my patient medicine and suit,

coach.say: If the germs don't leave, I'll give my patient medicine and suit,
coach.hint: Chunk it: If the germs don't leave, / I'll give my patient medicine and suit,

items.line_en: a lot of doctors and nurses too, we were work as a team, like superheroes.

coach.say: a lot of doctors and nurses too, we were work as a team, like superheroes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: a lot of doctors and nurses too, / we were work as a team, / like superheroes.

items.line_en: We will help people get better.

coach.say: We will help people get better.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We will help people get better.

items.line_en: There's machines that help us know how the patient is feeling.

coach.say: There's machines that help us know how the patient is feeling.
coach.hint: Chunk it: There's machines that help us know how the patient is feeling.

items.line_en: Beep, beep, beep, patient, 20% sick, beep, beep, tummy ache and fever.

coach.say: Beep, beep, beep, patient, 20% sick, beep, beep, tummy ache and fever.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Beep, beep, / beep, patient, 20% sick, beep, beep, tummy ache and fever.

items.line_en: As a giant hurts his leg, I would use my x-ray goggles to see if it was broken.

coach.say: As a giant hurts his leg, I would use my x-ray goggles to see if it was broken.
coach.hint: Chunk it: As a giant hurts his leg, / I would use my x-ray goggles to see if it was broken.

items.line_en: If it was, I would wrap the giant's leg up in a big blue cast so that it can heal.

coach.say: If it was, I would wrap the giant's leg up in a big blue cast so that it can heal.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If it was, / I would wrap the giant's leg up in a big blue cast so that it can heal.

items.line_en: I would draw a funny face on the cast, then make him smile.

coach.say: I would draw a funny face on the cast, then make him smile.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I would draw a funny face on the cast, / then make him smile.

items.line_en: I love being a doctor.

coach.say: I love being a doctor.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I love being a doctor.

items.line_en: Anything you want, it's really up to you.

coach.say: Anything you want, it's really up to you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Anything you want, / it's really up to you.

items.line_en: I'm Anika, I'm a doctor, imagine that.

coach.say: I'm Anika, I'm a doctor, imagine that.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm Anika, / I'm a doctor, / imagine that.
